dialogues.speaker: Mine Foreman
lines: Hold up — nobody crosses the collapsed haul without a Mine Pass.
Take this stamp. Clear the cart switch and mind the lanterns.
You're authorized for the inner tunnels now.

dialogues.speaker: Mine Foreman
lines: Lower the cart track before you try the rockfall route.

dialogues.speaker: Tunnel Medic
lines: Ash dust chews through stamina faster than you'd think.
I'll patch up your party before you push deeper.
Your JoyMon are rested and ready.

dialogues.speaker: Heart Tunnel Plaque
lines: Cindralith has claimed the deepest chamber.
Approach the gate when you are prepared to battle.

dialogues.speaker: Mine Entrance Sign
lines: Flip the cart switch to open the lower crossing.
Foreman office: west tunnel. Medic station: east tunnel.
